v8.0.12 removes the FPSS drift-injection CI job and its test script.
The test was designed when the C++ `static_assert(offsetof)` guards in
`thetadx.hpp` were hand-maintained against a Rust-generated C struct
layout. v8.0.11 moved both sides under the same TOML-driven generator,
so swapping a field in `fpss_event_schema.toml` regenerates the C
struct and the assert value in lockstep and the assertion can no
longer fail from schema drift. Kept as a misleading safety net, it
would only catch hand-edits that no longer belong in this repo.

`regen_byte_identical.sh` still guards generator determinism and the
C++ static asserts keep firing at compile time against any hand-
committed corruption of the checked-in C header.

No compatibility shims were added. `tdbe` remains at `0.12.0`.

## Removed

- `.github/workflows/ci.yml` — `FPSS drift injection` job.
- `scripts/test_drift_injection.sh` — associated test harness.

## Changed

- Release metadata bumps to `8.0.12` across the Rust crates, Python
  package, TypeScript package set (root + 3 platform subpackages +
  loader guard), and the OpenAPI spec.
